name: Anessa Perfect UV Skincare Milk
pros: Legendary SPF50+ PA++++ protection trusted by Japanese consumers for decades
Lightweight milk texture absorbs quickly without white cast or greasiness
Easily found at every convenience store, drugstore, and supermarket nationwide
cons: Higher price point compared to budget alternatives (¥2,198 for 60ml)
Contains some chemical UV filters which may irritate sensitive skin
shortDescription: Japan's most iconic UV milk—reliable broad-spectrum protection in an ultralight formula.
review: Anessa is the gold standard for sun protection in Japan, and for good reason. The milk formula dries to a natural finish without the sticky residue that plagues many sunscreens, making it ideal for daily use under makeup. Even if Japanese instructions feel overwhelming, the product's ubiquity in convenience stores means you'll have zero trouble finding it—this is what locals actually use.
